data.name: My Ghost Roommate
data.detailed_description:
Step into the quirky, steamy, and heartfelt story of My Ghost Roommate, a linear visual novel that blends romantic comedy with a supernatural twist.

Meet Juno, a shy and adorably clumsy ghost haunting the cozy apartment you just moved into. Bound by the regrets of a love she never found in life, Juno’s ethereal charm and longing heart are impossible to resist. As her new roommate, you’ll unravel her past, share awkward dinners, and maybe spark a connection that’s equal parts heartwarming and flirty.

Will you help Juno find closure, ignite a ghostly romance, or discover something even deeper? This short but unforgettable adventure is all about life, love, and letting go.

Features

  • Heartfelt Romantic Comedy – A linear story packed with witty banter, warm moments, and supernatural charm.

  • Fully Voiced Juno – Every shy giggle, sultry whisper, and heartfelt confession brought to life by professional voice acting.

  • Short & Sweet Gameplay – 2–2.5 hours of polished storytelling, perfect for a cozy evening session.

  • Stylized Visuals – Animated sprites and intimate scenes set in a cozy, haunted apartment.

Holiday Specials Included

My Ghost Roommate also includes two special seasonal stories that expand Juno’s journey with unique scenarios, outfits, and intimate moments—fully integrated into the main experience.

Halloween Special

When Juno asks to experience her first Halloween, what should be a simple night of decorations turns into a supernatural trial.
A mysterious cat spirit splits Juno into three fragments scattered across the city.

Can you reunite all three parts of your ghostly girlfriend and prove your love is strong enough to make her whole again?
This Halloween night will test trust, acceptance, and what it truly means to love someone—flaws and all.

Christmas Special

Celebrate your very first Christmas together!

What starts with decorating a tree turns into a festive adventure, including a Santa contest at the mall. Dress up, compete for the perfect tree, and bring the holiday magic home.

data.short_description: A romantic comedy visual novel where you move in with Juno, a shy ghost bound to your new apartment. Share awkward dinners, heartfelt moments, and maybe spark a supernatural romance in this short, charming story of love and letting go.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7300HQ or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB RAM MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7300HQ or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB RAM MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間
